Standard 5G but value for money decent in Vashi.
5G absent no covrage and speed terrible in Ludhiana.
Standard 5G but value for money decent in Pune.

The 5G experience in Trichy is middling. Technically faster than 4G but for daily browsing social media and messaging the difference is barely noticeable. Not bad by any means but not the transformative experience marketed to consumers. Just an average incremental improvement over what I had before.
Excellent 5G and intrenet blazing at 300 Mbps.

5G indoor coverage in Shimla main market is effectively zero. The moment I step inside any building the signal drops to 4G or disappears entirely. Since most people spend the majority of their time indoors this makes the 5G premium essentially worthless for real world usage.

I signed up for the 5G plan specifically because the coverage map showed full availability in Gachibowli airport road. The reality is that I get 5G signal maybe twenty percent of the time. The remaining eighty percent I am on 4G paying premium prices for a service I cannot actually access.

5G performance in Gurgaon university area has exceeded my expectations completely. The low latency combined with 500 Mbps throughput makes real-time applications like video conferencing and cloud computing feel instantaneous. No 5G yet but intrenet spd still good in Borivali. I would recommend upgrading to 5G on this operator specifically.
Consistent 5G connectivity in Bandra metro station.

5G speeds of 250 Mbps in Jodhpur combined with crystal clear HD call quality make this the complete connectivity package. Both data and voice services on the 5G network are genuinely superior to what I experienced on 4G. The 5G infrastructure investment is clearly paying dividends daily.
5G impressive but plan too expensive at Rs 599.

Average 5G experience in Patna with standard speeds around 600 Mbps and typical pricing at Rs 699. Nothing about the 5G proposition stands out in any direction. A neutral upgrade that meets minimum expectations. For someone who relies on fast mobile connectivity this matters greatly.
5G mediocre and support also average in Kharadi.
5G terrible and plan at Rs 599 overpriced.

After six months of waiting for 5G to arrive in Rohini airport road it finally launched but the experience is underwhelming to say the least. Speeds of 450 Mbps and coverage that disappears the moment I move away from major roads. Not what was promised.

The 5G experience in Navi Mumbai has been nothing short of disappointing. Coverage is patchy at best with the signal bouncing between 5G and 4G every few minutes. When it does connect to 5G the speeds of 250 Mbps are barely better than what I was getting on 4G. For the premium plan price this is unacceptable.
5G signal only works outdoors near towers in Jodhpur.
No 5G signal and calls keep dropping in Mysore.
5G experience worse than stable 4G here in Mangalore.
5G finally delivers on its promise in Pune.
5G speeds make cloud gaming viable on mobile in Chennai.
5G impressive and Rs 399 plan is worth it.

The gap between 5G marketing and reality in Salem is enormous and frankly dishonest. Advertisements show blazing fast downloads while my actual experience is sporadic connectivity and speeds of 450 Mbps that barely qualify as an improvement. Paid premium for nothing.
